zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord William de Radcliffe於1164年出生在英國藍卡爾拉德克利夫時，他的父親Sir Henry de Radeclive24歲，母親Joan Margaret Booth22歲。他於大約1181年與Lady Cecilia De Monthegon結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1220年在英國英格蘭藍卡爾拉德克利夫享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lord William de Radcliffe于1164年出生在英国藍卡爾拉德克利夫时，他的父亲Sir Henry de Radeclive24岁，母亲Joan Margaret Booth22岁。他于大约1181年与Lady Cecilia De Monthegon结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1220年在英国英格兰藍卡爾拉德克利夫享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Radcliffe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Ratliff
meanings: English (Suffolk): habitational name from one or more of the places so named, such as Radcliffe (Lancashire), Radcliffe on Trent and Ratcliffe on Soar (both Nottinghamshire), Radclive (Buckinghamshire), Ratcliffe Culey and Ratcliffe on the Wreake (both Leicestershire), Ratclyffe in Clyst Hydon, Ratcliffes in Thorverton, and Ratcliffes in Broad Clyst (all Devon), Ratcliff in Stepney (Middlesex), and Rackley in Compton Bishop (Somerset). The placenames derive from Old English rēad ‘red’ + clif ‘cliff, bank, steep slope’ (see also Rutley ). A family of the name Radcliffe trace their descent from Sir Nicholas de Radclyffe. He is said to have been a knight who held the major of Radcliffe in Lancashire and served Roger de Poitou, Baron de Marsey in the 11th century.

nameMeanings.name: Lord
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Lorraine   or variant spelling of   Laurie .

variants.name: Lorraine
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, in origin denoting a migrant from the province of Lorraine in eastern France. This derives its name from Latin Lotharingia ‘territory of the people of Lothar’. The latter is a Germanic personal name derived from hlud ‘fame’ + heri, hari ‘army’. Lorraine began to be used as a girl's name in Scotland in the 19th century, and for a time in the second half of the 20th century enjoyed great popularity, which has since waned.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

en.lifeSummary: When Lord William de Radcliffe was born in 1164, in Radcliffe, Lancashire, England, his father, Sir Henry de Radeclive, was 24 and his mother, Joan Margaret Booth, was 22. He married Lady Cecilia De Monthegon about 1181. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1220, in Radcliffe, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lord William de Radcliffe est né en 1164, à Radcliffe, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Henry de Radeclive, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Joan Margaret Booth, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Lady Cecilia De Monthegon environ 1181. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1220, à Radcliffe, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lord William de Radcliffe 1164 in Radcliffe, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Henry de Radeclive 24 und seine Mutter Joan Margaret Booth 22. Er hat um 1181 Lady Cecilia De Monthegon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1220 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Radcliffe, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lord William de Radcliffe è nato il nel 1164 nel Radcliffe, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Sir Henry de Radeclive, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Joan Margaret Booth, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Lady Cecilia De Monthegon circa 1181. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1220, nel Radcliffe, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 56 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Lord William de Radcliffe(이)가 1164년 영국 랭카실르 라드c리프에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Henry de Radeclive(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Margaret Booth(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1181년 Lady Cecilia De Monthegon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1220년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 라드c리프에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lord William de Radcliffe nasceu em 1164, em Radcliffe, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Henry de Radeclive, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Joan Margaret Booth, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Cecilia De Monthegon aproximadamente 1181. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1220, em Radcliffe, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord William de Radcliffe родился в 1164 г. в местности радклифф, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Henry de Radeclive было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Margaret Booth, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Cecilia De Monthegon около 1181 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1220 г. в местности радклифф, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lord William de Radcliffe nació en 1164, en Radcliffe, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Henry de Radeclive, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Joan Margaret Booth, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Lady Cecilia De Monthegon aproximadamente 1181. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1220, en Radcliffe, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 56 años.
